questionHtml: Sketch the mechanism for the reaction of propene with hydrogen bromide using curly arrows.
markschemeHtml:
curly arrow going from C=C to H of HBr AND curly arrow showing Br leaving ✔

representation of carbocation ✔

curly arrow going from lone pair/negative charge on Br− to C+ ✔


Award [2 max] for mechanism producing 1-brompropane.

meta.title: Sketch the mechanism for the reaction of propene with hydrogen bromide using curly arrows.
